producer.origin: elara-mesh maintainer receipts feed — act 019f782c-176c-7ad2-8637-bb093eca96b8; assembled from /record/{id}/wire: the signed act record + an epoch seal current at snapshot time (on today's single-zone mesh that is the zone-0 seal; per-act zone resolution lands with multi-zone).
